title: Dr. Faustus by Christopher Marlowe | Explanation in Hindi | BA English Hons
description:
When a brilliant scholar sells his soul to the devil just to taste forbidden knowledge and worldly power, the tragedy that unfolds isn't just sixteenth-century theatre — it's a warning that still rattles BA English Honours students in their 2nd semester exams. Christopher Marlowe's Doctor Faustus tears open the tension between Renaissance ambition and medieval morality, asking whether limitless desire is heroic or catastrophically self-destructive. If you're hunting for a clear, exam-ready explanation in Hindi that actually makes sense of Marlowe's complex blank verse and themes of damnation and free will, you've landed in exactly the right place.
